description:
Implement `hx-grid` (T3 tier) — 2/6 libraries ship this. CSS Grid layout wrapper with design-token-based column/gap system.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-grid/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-grid.ts`, `hx-grid.styles.ts`, `hx-grid.stories.ts`, `hx-grid.test.ts`

**`hx-grid` props:** `columns` (number|string — number for equal columns, string for CSS template like "1fr 2fr 1fr"), `gap` (`none`|`xs`|`sm`|`md`|`lg`|`xl`), `row-gap` (optional override), `column-gap` (optional override), `align` (`start`|`center`|`end`|`stretch`), `justify` (`start`|`center`|`end`|`stretch`)

**`hx-grid-item` (optional companion):** `column` (CSS grid-column value), `row` (CSS grid-row value), `span` (number — column span shorthand)

**Slots:** default (any content)

**CSS Parts:** `base`

**ARIA:** `role="presentation"` — this is a layout utility, not semantic.

**Implementation note:** Use CSS custom properties from `--hx-*` spacing tokens for gap values. `columns` prop maps to `grid-template-columns: repeat(N, 1fr)` or raw template string.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (column counts, gap variants, item placement), axe-core zero violations (must be presentation), Storybook with 2/3/4 column layouts + responsive demo, bundle < 2KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-grid — T3 CSS Grid Layout Component
